sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَخِي لُغَةَ الْبَرْمَجَةِ فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ الصَّيْفِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je naučio programski jezik u ljetnoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: My brother learned a programming language in summer school.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ بَرْنَامَجًا بَسِيطًا يَقُومُ بِجَمْعِ الْأَرْقَامِ تِلْقَائِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Napisao je jednostavan program koji automatski sabira brojeve.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote a simple program that adds numbers automatically.

sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ مُبَرْمِجًا نَاجِحًا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Želi postati uspješan programer u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: He wants to become a successful programmer in the future.
